title: Dashboards - Increased Flexibility on Dashboard View Sizing to Improve Usability
excerpt: When building a dashboard, you are currently restricted on the sizing you can select for the view. I am unable to make the view larger which is restrictive when trying to show a large amount of information without scroll…

posts.author: dlawrencer24 (Dan Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml: When building a dashboard, you are currently restricted on the sizing you can select for the view. I am unable to make the view larger which is restrictive when trying to show a large amount of information without scrolling. Would be great and enhance usability if able to have more flexibility when creating.
